svg.title: Conplaya — component architecture
svg.desc: How the major components in Conplaya (a console audio player) connect: CLI bootstrap, application orchestrator, playback engine, visualization pipeline, album-art renderer, and console output.
svg.text: .NET 9 console audio player · single-file Windows EXE · Unicode + 24-bit ANSI rendering

g.text: orchestrator: layout, per-track loop, advance handling
title · artist · album from ID3 / tags
Console: 24-bit ANSI · Unicode bars/braille · half-block album art · status line · cursor hidden
